info.title: Strategon Control Plane
info.description:
Human API for the Strategon control plane (Connect JSON over HTTP).

Authenticate with a session cookie (UI login) or a Bearer API token
(`Authorization: Bearer str_live_…`) minted from the UI **API tokens** page.

Agent gRPC/Connect endpoints are served on a separate port and are not
included in this document.

servers.description: Human API (same origin when using the embedded UI)

post.description: Browse a strategy WorkDir on a connected agent (one directory level).
Short-term resource trend from the PG sliding window (not a TSDB).
Machine-level shared files (full overwrite; independent of assignments).

connect-protocol-version.title: Connect-Protocol-Version
connect-protocol-version.description: Define the version of the Connect protocol

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

message.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

details.description: A list of messages that carry the error details. There is no limit on the number of messages.

type.description: A URL that acts as a globally unique identifier for the type of the serialized message. For example: `type.googleapis.com/google.rpc.ErrorInfo`. This is used to determine the schema of the data in the `value` field and is the discriminator for the `debug` field.

value.description: The Protobuf message, serialized as bytes and base64-encoded. The specific message type is identified by the `type` field.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Deserialized error detail payload. The 'type' field indicates the schema. This field is for easier debugging and should not be relied upon for application logic.

connect.error_details.Any.description: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message, with an additional debug field for ConnectRPC error details.

createdAt.title: created_at
createdAt.description:
Set by the control plane on RegisterArtifact (registration time). Defines
 "latest" for catalog UI / deploy convenience — not version-string order.

strategyplatform.v1.ArtifactRef.title: ArtifactRef
strategyplatform.v1.ArtifactRef.description:
ArtifactRef is content-addressed: config is also an ArtifactRef, so a config
 change is just a new digest that travels the exact same deploy path.

detail.title: detail
detail.description: Free-form context (e.g. downloaded paths for DownloadFiles).

path.title: path
path.description: relative to strategy WorkDir; "" or "." = root

strategyplatform.v1.Condition.title: Condition
strategyplatform.v1.Condition.description:
Condition expresses health as a k8s-style condition list rather than a single
 bool. type is one of "Live" | "Ready" | "BusinessHealthy".

jitterSeconds.title: jitter_seconds
jitterSeconds.description: random jitter to avoid all machines at once

generation.title: generation
generation.description: new spec generation, for the frontend to track convergence

strategyplatform.v1.GetControlPlaneVersi.title: GetControlPlaneVersionRequest
strategyplatform.v1.GetControlPlaneVersi.description: Control-plane binary build metadata (display only; not stored).

strategy.title: strategy
strategy.description: Empty = machine-level samples; non-empty = that strategy's process samples.

rangeSeconds.title: range_seconds
rangeSeconds.description: Lookback window in seconds; 0 defaults to 3600 (1 hour).

strategies.title: strategies
strategies.description:
Per-strategy desired+actual merged view. Assembled by the control plane so
 the frontend never joins spec/status itself.

agentBuildVersion.title: agent_build_version
agentBuildVersion.description: buildinfo.Version from the agent — display only; not for compatibility

lastProcesses.title: last_processes
lastProcesses.description: Latest per-process metrics from Heartbeat (instantaneous snapshot).

strategyplatform.v1.Machine.title: Machine
strategyplatform.v1.Machine.description:
This is a different kind of connection from AgentService: low-frequency,
 browser/CLI, must be curl-able. Served over HTTP/JSON via Connect. All write
 paths go through the control plane, which validates, updates spec, increments
 generation, and pushes the new DesiredState over the stream.

generation.title: generation
generation.description: control plane increments on spec change

strategyplatform.v1.ObjectMeta.title: ObjectMeta
strategyplatform.v1.ObjectMeta.description:
ObjectMeta borrows the k8s design vocabulary (metadata/spec/status) without
 importing k8s. generation is incremented by the control plane on every spec
 change and is the sole coupling between desired (spec) and actual (status).

strategyplatform.v1.RegisterArtifactRequ.title: RegisterArtifactRequest
strategyplatform.v1.RegisterArtifactRequ.description:
Artifact catalog: Deploy resolves artifact_version against registered
 artifacts (digest + uri). Additive follow-on so the
 human API can replace /admin/assign without requiring digest in every Deploy.

strategyplatform.v1.ResourceSamplePoint.title: ResourceSamplePoint
strategyplatform.v1.ResourceSamplePoint.description: One point in the short-term PG sliding window (sparkline source).

artifactVersion.title: artifact_version
artifactVersion.description: required; references a registered binary artifact

strategyplatform.v1.SetDeploymentRequest.title: SetDeploymentRequest
strategyplatform.v1.SetDeploymentRequest.description:
SetDeployment sets a full deployment combination (artifact + config + args +
 env). Any change bumps generation — the deployment version, independent of
 artifact versions. Deploy remains the convenience path for version-only rolls
 that preserve args/env.

generation.title: generation
generation.description: new deployment generation, for convergence tracking

schedules.title: schedules
schedules.description: full overwrite of the strategy's cron

strategyplatform.v1.SetSharedFilesReques.title: SetSharedFilesRequest
strategyplatform.v1.SetSharedFilesReques.description:
SetSharedFiles sets the full set of machine-level shared files (full overwrite,
 mirroring SetSchedule semantics). Each entry references a registered artifact.

artifactVersion.title: artifact_version
artifactVersion.description: Version of the registered artifact to materialize.

artifactName.title: artifact_name
artifactName.description:
Catalog name of the registered artifact. Empty means use `name` (the
 on-disk basename). Set explicitly when the catalog name differs from the
 landing basename (e.g. future archives: artifact "instruments.tar.gz"
 landing as "instruments").

strategyplatform.v1.StartRequest.title: StartRequest
strategyplatform.v1.StartRequest.description: Start resumes a previously Stopped deployment in place (same pinned version).

strategyplatform.v1.StopRequest.title: StopRequest
strategyplatform.v1.StopRequest.description: Stop halts the process but keeps the deployment (assignment + WorkDir/logs).

converged.title: converged
converged.description: Convergence judgment (control plane computed; frontend just renders) desired == running && phase == HEALTHY (or stopped && STOPPED)

leaseHeld.title: lease_held
leaseHeld.description: agent may leave unset; UI shows unknown until lease state is reported

schedules.title: schedules
schedules.description: Desired cron schedules (from StrategyAssignmentSpec); read-back for UI.

startedAt.title: started_at
startedAt.description: Process start time from agent StatusReport; UI computes uptime as now - started_at.

cpuPercent.title: cpu_percent
cpuPercent.description: Latest process metrics from Heartbeat (instantaneous; trends via GetMachineMetrics).

deployedAt.title: deployed_at
deployedAt.description: Latest Deploy/SetDeployment/Rollback audit timestamp when available.

strategyplatform.v1.StrategyView.title: StrategyView
strategyplatform.v1.StrategyView.description:
StrategyView is a frontend-friendly join of desired (spec) and actual
 (status). converged is computed by the control plane using the same digest
 equality as the agent reconciler.
